mode: new background threads for selected revisions; reuse approved Suming emblem
current_image_policy: Accepted revisions replace the stable unversioned current PNG only after the previous current image is archived in history_dir with the next _vNN filename.

threads.thread_title: 断航故土 昭明帝国航海徽章 v02
threads.task: Generate one new standalone square Zhaoming emblem with advanced maritime civilization, compass/astrolabe, sun-and-moon identity, and high-end imperial craft.

threads.thread_title: 断航故土 北境万兽骨木徽章 v02
threads.task: Generate one new standalone Wanshou emblem using bone, wood, antler, tooth, bark, hide cord, and pigment only; no metal or technology.

reused_assets.reason: User approved the previous Suming design and requested no redesign.

acceptance_checks: Zhaoming v02 clearly reads as an advanced maritime imperial civilization, with compass/astrolabe navigation and sun-and-moon identity.
Zhaoming v02 has higher craft value and nautical feeling than v01.
Wanshou v02 contains no metal, gold, iron, brass, machinery, or technology-tree cues.
Wanshou v02 uses bone, wood, antler, tooth, bark, hide cord, and carved natural pigments as its primary material language.
Suming remains the approved v01 image without regeneration.
Each final asset is one independent faction emblem image with no text or multi-panel sheet layout.
Current asset references remain on stable unversioned paths; any replaced image is archived under the history directory with a versioned filename.
